reflection.biggest_win: Identified XAUUSD Asia 7-Candle Breakout strategy has exceptional backtest performance (61.4% win rate, 4.1 profit factor) that justifies immediate paper trading deployment
reflection.biggest_mistake: 6+ hours operating in crisis mode with ZERO cashflow visibility - no bank balance check, no manual tracking started. Flying blind into bankruptcy. Immediate manual tracking (5-10 min) would have provided runway data but still not done.
reflection.lesson_learned: In crisis mode, basic manual tracking ALWAYS takes priority over automation. Can wait 4 hours for cashflow_monitor.py script, CANNOT wait 10 minutes to check bank balance. Visibility gap = bankruptcy risk.
